analysis.consistency: High. The description clearly outlines the activation, area of effect, damage scaling for different targets (glass/crystal), saving throw mechanics, and the chance of self-destruction/explosion.
analysis.quality: Good. The mechanics are detailed, providing clear numerical outputs for damage (5d6 standard, 10d6 special) and a fixed chance of failure (20%). The inclusion of secondary effects (deafened condition) and specific vulnerability scaling is well-documented.

mechanics.destruction_damage: 10d6 fire damage to the blower (if it explodes)
